name: claude-doctor
description: Monorepo for Claude Doctor CLI and Dashboard

scripts.dev:full: pnpm build:cli && concurrently -n cli,server,dash -c blue,green,magenta 'pnpm dev:cli' 'pnpm --filter @claude-doctor/cli exec nodemon --watch dist --exec "node dist/index.mjs serve --no-open --project $PWD"' 'pnpm dev:dashboard'
